The Mask

Radiantè Pro Mask

Wireless LED Light Therapy · 4 Light Modes

$350 Free Express Shipping · 14-day returns
Red Light
630nm Wavelength

Stimulates fibroblast activity and collagen synthesis at the dermal layer. Clinically proven to reduce fine lines and improve skin elasticity.

  • For visibly firmer, more youthful-looking skin
  • Fine line reduction
  • For a visibly more even and balanced complexion
  • Enhanced firmness
Purple Light
Red + Blue Blend

A powerful combination of red and blue wavelengths that simultaneously targets acne-causing bacteria while stimulating for visibly firmer, more youthful-looking skin — ideal for acne-prone skin that also needs anti-aging support.

  • For clearer-looking skin
  • For visibly firmer-looking skin
  • Supports a cleaner-looking complexion
  • Balanced skin tone
Orange Light
Revitalizing Wavelength

Orange light energizes skin cells and boosts radiance from within, improving overall skin vitality, reducing dullness, and promoting a visibly brighter, more luminous complexion.

  • Skin brightening
  • Radiance boost
  • Dullness reduction
  • Improved skin vitality
Blue Light
415nm Wavelength

Blue light is clinically proven to penetrate pores and destroy acne-causing bacteria at the source, making it the go-to mode for active breakouts, oily skin, and congested pores.

  • Supports a smoother, cleaner complexion
  • Unclogs pores
  • Controls oil production
  • Clears active breakouts
◎
Flexible Silicone Construction
Made from premium medical-grade silicone — soft, lightweight, and flexible enough to contour perfectly to any face shape for full-coverage treatment.

The magnetic remote snaps onto the mask — no wires, no tethers. Switch modes freely and move around during your session without any restrictions.

02

−54%

Reduction in inflammatory acne lesions after 8-week blue and purple light therapy protocol in a controlled clinical trial. View study ↗

03
Light Mode Coverage
630–blue/purple wavelength

The optical window where mitochondria most efficiently absorb photonic energy, directly validated in published research.

04
Daily Treatment
10–15 min/day

Optimal daily treatment window for visible results, as established in multiple peer-reviewed dermatology studies.

Why It Works

Six reasons your skin loves Radiantè

⬡

For Clearer-Looking Skin

Blue and purple light wavelengths target acne-causing bacteria deep within pores, while reducing sebum production and pore size for visibly clearer skin.

◈

Anti-Aging

Red light stimulates fibroblasts to increase collagen and elastin production, visibly reducing fine lines and wrinkles within weeks.

◇

Skin Firmness

Dual-wavelength treatment restores structural proteins in the dermal matrix, lifting and tightening skin from within.

△

Redness Reduction

Pulse mode calms inflammatory pathways and strengthens capillary walls, reducing redness, rosacea, and reactive skin.

○

Skin Barrier Repair

Purple light accelerates the natural repair cycle of damaged skin cells, working to rebuild and strengthen your protective skin barrier.

✦

Collagen Support

Clinical studies show up to 40% increase in collagen density with consistent use — the foundation of youthful, plump skin.

The Ritual

Four steps to luminous skin

Cleanse

Begin with clean, dry skin. Remove all makeup and skincare products to ensure maximum light penetration.

Select Mode

Choose your light mode using the magnetic remote. Red for anti-aging, Blue or Purple for acne, Orange for radiance and brightening.

Treat

Wear the mask for 10–15 minutes. The soft silicone fit contours to your face, delivering light to every surface simultaneously — no wires, no restrictions.

Nourish

Apply your serum or moisturiser immediately after. Light therapy opens absorption pathways for deeper product penetration.

Questions

Everything you need to know

Most users notice improved skin texture and radiance within 2–3 weeks of consistent daily use. Significant anti-aging and acne results typically appear after 6–12 weeks of regular treatment.

Yes. LED light therapy is clinically validated as safe and effective across all Fitzpatrick skin types. Unlike UV treatments, LED therapy does not cause pigmentation damage.

For optimal results, we recommend daily sessions of 10–20 minutes. The mask can be used safely every day — light therapy benefits compound with consistent use over time.

Yes, the wireless magnetic remote is included with every Radiantè Mask. It attaches magnetically to the side of the mask and allows seamless mode switching without removing the device.

We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied with your Radiantè Mask, return it within 14 days for a full refund — no questions asked.

Legal Notice

Product Disclaimer

Last updated: May 2026
Please read this disclaimer carefully before purchasing or using the Radiantè LED Light Therapy Mask. By purchasing or using this product, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to the terms set forth below.

Not Medical Advice

The Radiantè LED Light Therapy Mask is a cosmetic wellness device and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition. All information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

Who Should Not Use This Product

This product is not suitable for individuals who:

  • Are pregnant or breastfeeding
  • Have been diagnosed with epilepsy or are prone to photosensitive seizures
  • Have active skin cancer or a history of skin cancer on the face
  • Are taking photosensitizing medications (certain antibiotics, retinoids, or acne medications)
  • Have active skin infections, open wounds, or severe inflammatory conditions in the treatment area
  • Have implanted electronic devices such as pacemakers or neurostimulators
  • Are under 18 without parental supervision and medical guidance
⚠ Eye Safety Warning

This device emits bright LED light. Do not stare directly into the LEDs. Individuals with heightened light sensitivity or eye conditions should consult an ophthalmologist before use. Keep out of reach of children under 18.

Individual Results May Vary

Results will vary between individuals based on skin type, frequency of use, age, lifestyle, and other personal factors. Any testimonials or outcome statistics referenced on this website reflect individual experiences and are not guarantees of results.

Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Radiantè and its owners, operators, employees, suppliers, and affiliates shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or relating to:

  • Your use or misuse of this product
  • Failure to follow the provided usage instructions or safety guidelines
  • Any allergic reaction, skin sensitivity, or adverse response to LED light therapy
  • Any medical condition that arises or worsens in connection with use of this device
  • Any reliance on information presented on this website

Safe Usage Instructions

  • Limit sessions to 10–20 minutes per day
  • Allow skin to rest at least 24 hours between sessions if irritation occurs
  • Do not use on broken, sunburned, or severely irritated skin
  • Discontinue use immediately and consult a doctor if you experience pain, burning, or swelling
  • Keep device clean, dry, and stored away from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures

Governing Law

This disclaimer and any disputes arising from it shall be governed by the laws of the State of New Jersey, United States. Any legal action must be filed in the appropriate courts located within New Jersey.

Contact

Questions about this disclaimer or product safety? Reach us at support@radiante.com before purchasing.
